name: Content Foundation
description: Required forum content foundation for discussions, posts, first-post lifecycle, read state, and content metadata.

extra.protected_reason: 论坛内容基础域承载 Discussion/Post 生命周期，不能作为普通扩展停用或卸载。

security.capabilities_notice: Required content foundation; will own discussion and post records, first-post lifecycle, read states, counters, baseline visibility, and moderation lifecycle.
